topIngredients.name: Retinol (Pure)
topIngredients.benefit: Gold standard anti-aging ingredient that reduces wrinkles and boosts collagen

topIngredients.name: Shea Butter
topIngredients.benefit: Rich emollient that prevents the dryness associated with retinol

topIngredients.name: Glycerin
topIngredients.benefit: Humectant that maintains hydration during retinol adaptation period

verdict: RoC Retinol Night Cream is a clinically validated wrinkle reduction treatment backed by over 30 years of clinical studies. The shea butter base makes it unusually comfortable for a retinol formula. Expect results in 12 weeks.
